opinion.h4: FRIEDMAN v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 675. Decided March 30, 1959.
opinion.p: Irving D. Friedman and Sol Friedman for appellant.
Solicitor General Rankin and Robert W. Ginnane for the United States and the Interstate Commerce Commission, appellees. Joseph H. Wright and Erle J. Zoll, Jr. for railroad appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
